meta.title: SIT Copilot
meta.subtitle:
AI-Powered Lecture Support System
講義支援AIシステム
meta.affiliation: Shibaura Institute of Technology / 芝浦工業大学

problems: Students miss key points while taking notes
Non-native speakers struggle with real-time comprehension

features: Real-time Captioning: Instant speech-to-text with source tracking
Live Q&A: Context-aware answers using slide content
Multi-Modal Input: Voice, text, and visual (slide OCR)
Accessibility: Adjustable fonts, high contrast, easy Japanese

features.name: Captioning Flow
features.description: Real-time ASR with Japanese correction. Evidence tags: Speech | Slide | Board. Rolling summaries every 30s.

features.name: Q&A Flow
features.description: BM25 + Hybrid search for relevance. Context from slides + transcript. Source verification prevents hallucination.

features.name: OCR Flow
features.description: 1 FPS capture with change detection. ROI support (slide area only). Quality filtering by confidence.

prompts.name: Captioning
prompts.content: Summarize the last 60 seconds of lecture content. Group related points. Mark sources: [Speech], [Slide], [Blackboard]. Max 150 words.

prompts.name: Q&A
prompts.content: Using ONLY the provided lecture transcript and slide text, answer the question. Cite sources with (chunk_id). If information is insufficient, say 'I cannot answer from the available materials'.

highlights: Accessibility features: font scaling, high contrast
Observability: WandB Weave for all operations
